title: SpookyPack
description: A Minecraft horror modpack I made for a video that was never released.
body:
# SpookyPack

### A Minecraft modpack for fabric 1.20.1

This is a horror modpack that I made for a YouTube video that I never got round to making, I've decided to share it with you in the hope that you'll find it ~~really terrifying~~ fun!


<details>
<summary>Mods (SPOILERS)</summary>

A full list of mods can be found [Here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/13IF-2IEnScBuWWuEDTh5dV8DeK7vOJHp48YMWjoV1Fc/edit?usp=sharing)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Updates</summary>

None Yet! :)
</details>

I’ll update this if I feel like it.
